overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a helicopter flight simulator (AS350) flying over mountainous terrain. The helicopter starts with clear visibility of forested valleys and scattered buildings, then ascends into thick haze and clouds, eventually entering complete whiteout conditions.

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter steadily over forested mountain valley with clear visibility

entered.detail: forested mountain ridges surrounding the valley on all sides
cluster of buildings and houses scattered across the valley floor
tall tower structure visible on the distant hillside

segments.scene_description: The helicopter flies over a lush green mountain valley with clear morning visibility. Forested ridges surround the area while a small settlement is visible below. The instrument panel shows steady flight parameters as the aircraft maintains altitude over the terrain.

events.description: helicopter enters thick haze layer, visibility begins to drop rapidly as clouds approach

agents.ego_description: ascending into cloud layer while maintaining forward flight over mountains

entered.detail: thick white cloud formation ahead at higher altitude
atmospheric haze reducing visibility between aircraft and ground

segments.scene_description: As the helicopter gains altitude, it encounters increasing haze and approaches a thick cloud bank. The valley settlement fades from view while the surrounding mountains become progressively obscured by the atmospheric moisture.

scene_state.functional_zone: complete whiteout conditions inside dense cloud layer

events.description: visibility drops to near zero as helicopter enters thick cloud bank, ground completely obscured
slight right turn maneuver while flying blind in instrument meteorological conditions

agents.ego_description: flying through dense cloud cover with zero visibility, relying on instruments

entered.detail: dense white cloud mass completely enveloping the aircraft

segments.scene_description: The helicopter enters complete whiteout conditions inside thick clouds, with no ground or sky visible. The view becomes a uniform gray-white as the aircraft continues flying on instruments through the dense cloud layer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective that transitions from a clear flight over a lush valley into a total atmospheric whiteout. It begins with a steady glide over green mountain ridges and a small settlement visible below under clear morning light. As the helicopter gains altitude, the landscape gradually fades behind an encroaching haze that obscures the surrounding peaks. The scene then shifts as the aircraft penetrates a thick cloud bank, causing the terrain to vanish entirely. Finally, the view transforms into a uniform gray-white void where all external visibility is lost to the dense cloud layer.
